ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprints" (
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sprint */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the sprint belongs to */,
  "sprint_name" TEXT /* Name of the sprint */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sprint */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sprint */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sprint (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Goal or objective of the sprint */,
  "velocity" INTEGER /* Velocity of the sprint (e.g., number of story points) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sprint */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the sprint was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the sprint */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the sprint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprints_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sprint the issue belongs to */,
  "issue_title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "issue_created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was created */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was resolved */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of the issue (e.g., bug, feature, task) */,
  "story_points" INTEGER /* Number of story points for the issue */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the issue */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_sprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("sprint_id") REFERENCES sprints ("sprint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, developer, tester) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment explaining the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprint_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sprint being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment explaining the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprint_history_sprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("sprint_id") REFERENCES sprints ("sprint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., question, answer, note) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., issue creation, resolution, sprint completion) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time the event occurred */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of the custom field (e.g., text, dropdown, checkbox) */,
  "field_description" TEXT /* Description of the custom field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_custom_fields" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the custom field */,
  "field_value" TEXT /* Value of the custom field for the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprint_custom_fields" (
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sprint */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the custom field */,
  "field_value" TEXT /* Value of the custom field for the sprint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sprint_id", "field_id")
)
